title: Can Opendoor's AI Home Assessments Drive Speed and Scale?
text: Can Opendoor's AI Home Assessments Drive Speed and Scale? Opendoor's AI-powered home assessment technology represents a key pillar of the company's Opendoor 2.0 strategy. The technology has achieved dramatic improvements in operational efficiency: Assessment time reduced from nearly a day to 10 minutes, Weekly assessment volume increased to nearly 750 homes, Cost per assessment has declined significantly due to automation. Management has highlighted that AI models analyze up to 500+ distinct property insights, learned from over 250,000 real estate transactions. The technology enables the company to scale assessment capacity without proportionally increasing headcount, driving significant leverage in the business model. Early results suggest the AI approach is delivering on its promise to drive both speed and unit economics improvement, supporting management's path to profitability.
